subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: Ruth pre consultation briefing note is due to me before you board for Halifax on October 8. Any Ouellet facing communication passes through you first. Reminder that any pre release Mobilite Plateau numbers are under embargo until the October 15 room.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: Understood. Briefing draft to you by end of October 7. No new outward communication to the council side has been cleared this cycle. Nothing goes out to David without my sign off.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: Ruth quick question. What is the parking loss modelling on Saint Denis showing for the current scenario. I will get calls from merchants after the room and want to be able to answer honestly.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: David happy to walk you through the parking loss modelling in advance of the room. Pre release figures are under embargo until October 15 at 7 PM so I cannot share the specific numbers in email. Suggest a fifteen minute office check in on October 13.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: Ruth I will handle the ACSDP outreach on the Saint Denis segment. Please prepare the delivery window language for the councillor briefing and hold it until I confirm with the association one more time.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: Sophie thank you. Holding the delivery window phrasing until you sign off. Will fold the framing into the briefing note.

subject: RE Mobilite Plateau briefing note for 15 October consultation
body_preview: October 13 at 1 30 PM works. Please keep me informed if anything shifts before the consultation. Constituent calls are expected.
